name: [TC-601] Create Sale Draft (TX-S1)
steps:
1. Go to /transactions/new → select 'Sale'
2. Fill:
   - Customer: Ahmed Traders (C1)
   - Date: 2026-03-10
   - Delivery Fee: 300
   - Notes: First sale test
3. Add line 1: P1-V1 (Small S), Qty 8, Unit Price 2000, Discount 500
4. Add line 2: P1-V2 (Medium), Qty 3, Unit Price 2200, Discount 0
5. Verify totals: Line1=(8×2000)-500=15500, Line2=6600, Subtotal=22100, Delivery=300, Total=22400
6. Save as Draft (do NOT post)
expected_result:
- Status: DRAFT, Total: PKR 22,400
- C1 balance still PKR 0.00
- P1-V1 stock still 30
- Dashboard receivables still PKR 0
notes: RECORD TX-S1 ID. Draft must NOT affect any balances or stock.

name: [TC-602] View Sale Draft in List & Filter Tests
steps:
1. Go to /transactions
2. Verify TX-S1: status DRAFT, type SALE, customer Ahmed Traders, PKR 22,400
3. Filter type=SALE → TX-S1 visible
4. Filter type=PURCHASE → TX-S1 NOT visible
5. Filter status=DRAFT → TX-S1 visible
6. Filter status=POSTED → TX-S1 NOT visible
expected_result:
- TX-S1 appears correctly in list
- Type and status filters isolate correctly
- No cross-contamination with purchase transactions

name: [TC-603] Post Sale TX-S1 and Verify All Side Effects
steps:
1. Open TX-S1 → click 'Post' → confirm
2. Verify status = POSTED, document number assigned (e.g. SAL-001)
3. Check /customer/detail/[C1_ID]:
   - Balance = PKR 22,400.00
   - Ledger tab: 1 entry dated 2026-03-10, amount 22,400, running balance 22,400
   - Open Documents: TX-S1 listed, remaining PKR 22,400
4. Check /products/detail/[P1_ID]:
   - P1-V1 stock = 22 (30-8), P1-V2 stock = 2 (5-3)
   - Avg Cost unchanged (P1-V1=1500, P1-V2=1100)
   - Movements: SALE_OUT entries for P1-V1 (-8) and P1-V2 (-3)
5. Check /transactions: TX-S1 status = POSTED
6. Check / Dashboard:
   - Receivables = PKR 22,400
   - Cash & Bank = PKR 170,000 (unchanged)
7. Check /reports/aged-receivables (date 2026-03-14): C1 = PKR 22,400
expected_result:
- C1 balance: PKR 22,400
- P1-V1 stock: 22, P1-V2 stock: 2
- Avg cost unchanged
- Dashboard receivables: PKR 22,400
- Cash & Bank: unchanged PKR 170,000
notes: Key: Avg cost must NOT change on sale — it only changes on purchase.

name: [TC-604] Post Second Sale TX-S2 and Verify Accumulation
steps:
1. Create sale: C1, Date 2026-03-12, No delivery
   Line: P1-V1, Qty 5, Price 2000. Total = PKR 10,000
2. Save Draft → Post
3. Check C1 balance = PKR 32,400 (22,400 + 10,000)
4. Check C1 Ledger: 2 entries, running balance 32,400
5. Check C1 Open Documents: 2 invoices (TX-S1 PKR 22,400 + TX-S2 PKR 10,000)
6. Check P1-V1 stock = 17 (22-5)
7. Dashboard Receivables = PKR 32,400
expected_result:
- C1 balance: PKR 32,400
- P1-V1 stock: 17
- 2 ledger entries, 2 open invoices

name: [TC-605] Post Sale TX-S3 to C2 and Verify Isolation
steps:
1. Create sale: C2 (Zara Retail), Date 2026-03-13, Delivery 200
   Line: P2-V1 (6mm), Qty 20, Price 100. Total = (20×100)+200 = PKR 2,200
2. Save Draft → Post
3. Check C2 balance = PKR 2,200
4. Verify C1 balance still PKR 32,400 (not affected)
5. Check P2-V1 stock = 80 (100-20)
6. Dashboard Receivables = PKR 34,600 (32,400+2,200), customer count = 2
expected_result:
- C2 balance: PKR 2,200
- C1 balance: PKR 32,400 (isolated)
- P2-V1 stock: 80
- Dashboard receivables: PKR 34,600

name: [TC-606] Oversell Test — Sell Beyond Available Stock
steps:
1. Create sale: C1, line: P1-V2 (Medium), Qty 999, Price 2200
   (P1-V2 only has 2 Meters in stock)
2. Test A: Save as Draft — note if allowed
3. Test B: Try to Post — note if blocked or allowed
4. If posted: check if P1-V2 stock goes negative
5. Delete the draft/void if posting was allowed
expected_result:
- Expected: Post should be blocked with 'Insufficient stock' error
- P1-V2 stock must not go below 0
- If negative stock is created: CRITICAL BUG
notes: Document exact behavior: blocked at draft, blocked at post, or allowed. All cases should be logged.

name: [TC-607] Reports Spot-Check After Sales
steps:
1. /reports/aged-receivables, date 2026-03-14:
   C1 = PKR 32,400 (0-30 days), C2 = PKR 2,200, Total = PKR 34,600
2. /reports/inventory-valuation, date 2026-03-14:
   P1-V1 qty17 val25500, P1-V2 qty2 val2200, P2-V1 qty80 val4000, P2-V2 qty50 val4000, Total = PKR 35,700
3. /reports/profit-loss, range 2026-03-10 to 2026-03-14:
   Revenue = PKR 34,600, Gross Profit must be positive
4. /reports/trial-balance, date 2026-03-14:
   AR ~PKR 34,600 Dr, AP ~PKR 61,000 Cr, Inventory ~PKR 35,700, Balanced
expected_result:
- Aged Receivables total: PKR 34,600
- Inventory Valuation total: PKR 35,700
- P&L revenue: PKR 34,600, gross profit positive
- Trial Balance: balanced
